item.title: 24/7 Deep Sea Discovery: From Immortal Jellyfish to the Ocean's Deadliest Apex Predators
item.description:
Dive into the deepest mysteries of the ocean in this Nature Frontiers marathon. We’ve compiled all our most fascinating underwater discoveries—from creatures that literally live forever to the silent hunters of the abyss.
What you’ll see tonight:
The immortal sea creatures scientists can't explain. Deep-sea predators that create their own light. The truth about the ocean's most misunderstood sharks. Alien-like life forms found 4,000 meters down. Stay tuned, join the live chat, and let us know which deep-sea mystery surprises you the most!
